name: Empyrean Cowl
implicitMods: 7% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage
12% of Fire Damage taken Recouped as Life
craftedMods: +1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that multiplies damage over time and increases skill effect duration of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies deal 20% more Damage over Time
You and nearby allies have 20% increased Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 75% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Gain 24% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

typeLine: Alchemist's Quicksilver Flask of the Owl
explicitMods: 63% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: The Fulcrum
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
implicitMods: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitMods: 28% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
19% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
30% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Elemental Ailments you inflict are Reflected to you
Elemental Damage with Hits is Lucky while you are Shocked
Damage Penetrates 10% Elemental Resistances while you are Chilled
Gain 40% of Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element while you are Ignited
flavourText: To stand at the confluence of the elements,
the master must achieve perfect balance.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. Performing any skill replaces this buff with one that boosts melee physical damage of skills you use yourself (it will not apply to your melee skills used by totems). Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
explicitMods: 100% increased Skill Duration per Frenzy Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 2403 Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +24% to Quality of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with a duration.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 50% more Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have 1% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill. Minions cannot gain the Lifetap buff.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Cost Life instead of Mana

Gain Lifetap after Spending a total of 23 Life on Upfront
Costs and Effects of a Supported Skill
Supported Skills deal 10% more Damage while you have Lifetap
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

typeLine: Alchemist's Amethyst Flask of the Cheetah
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

name: Glyph Vise
implicitMods: 0.4% of Fire Damage Leeched as Life
Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.4 metres
explicitMods: 49 to 77 added Fire Damage against Burning Enemies

socketedItems.secDescrText: Conjures an icy barrier that chills enemies when they hit you. You drop chilled ground while moving, and take less Fire and Physical damage while stationary.
explicitMods: Buff grants 21% less Physical Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Buff grants 21% less Fire Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Chill Enemy for 0.5 seconds when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 25% increased Aura effect
Supported Skills Reserve Life instead of Mana
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 203.3 Life per second

craftedMods: 15% of Damage Taken from Hits is Leeched as Life during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

explicitMods: Reflects 85 Fire Damage to Melee Attackers
40% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage
flavourText: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Flaming bolts rain down over the targeted area. They explode when landing, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets a corpse, causing it to explode, dealing fire damage. The explosion is not affected by modifiers to spell damage and cannot be reflected. Cannot target corpses that have been created by skills.
explicitMods: Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to 35% of the corpse's Maximum Life

name: Winterweave
implicitMods: Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
explicitMods: Adds 14 to 25 Fire Damage to Attacks
Adds 13 to 25 Cold Damage to Attacks
The Effect of Chill on you is reversed

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

name: Valyrium
explicitMods: Stun Threshold is based on Energy Shield instead of Life
flavourText: They will rise and fall in fire and blood.

craftedMods: Regenerate 3% of Life per second during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a sudden burst of cold in a targeted area, damaging enemies. Also creates an expanding area which is filled with chilled ground, and deals cold damage over time to enemies. Enemies that die while in the area have a chance to grant Frenzy Charges. The cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge.
explicitMods: Deals 1950 Base Cold Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Chilled Ground Base initial radius is 1.5 metres
Chilled Ground Base final radius is 3 metres
25% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge when an Enemy Dies while in this Skill's Area
